summary: Frontend testing of ComplianceLibraryPage and SystemArchitectureDiagram. Both pages load without JS errors. All required elements found and interactive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. SystemArchitectureDiagram renders on homepage with all threat vectors, guard nodes, pillar nodes visible and clickable. ComponentDetail panel opens on click. ACTIVE status indicators visible. ComplianceLibraryPage loads without errors, ResourceCard buy buttons (buy-lp-res-001) and PacketCard buy buttons (buy-btn-lp-pkt-001) found and clickable.
